title: ateleia standleyana
intro: Ateleia standleyana, also known as Ateleia, is a plant species native to the Americas, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to lower blood pressure and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. Ateleia standleyana is believed to offer several health benefits, including the potential treatment of cardiovascular diseases, diabetes, and certain types of cancer. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties.
